events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component or condition shown, name visible defect cues. Setting heavy industrial, PPE selection, observed field condition: voltage glove class wrong or overdue. Work rough-complete. Component condition categories: installed-defective. Need decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Voltage glove wrong class or overdue can lead to electric shock; critical maybe. Let's decide high or critical. NFPA 70E requires voltage-rated gloves with appropriate class and periodic testing. Overdue means testing expired. Wrong class means insufficient rating. This is fail. Component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn/degraded? Overdue maybe degraded. We'll include installed-defective, non-compliant. Maybe worn if overdue. But scenario says voltage glove class wrong or overdue. Use installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value not asked 0. Sound etc 0. Findings: gloves rated for wrong voltage class / last test date expired. Actions: remove from service, replace with properly rated and in-test gloves, retrain, inspect PPE program. References: NFPA 70E 130.7(C)(1), OSHA 1910.137. Need JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.
